overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a rainy night at a frontier campsite. The player character explores the muddy encampment, observes two men playing dominoes at a wooden table, and enters a canvas tent. The scene is illuminated by campfires and lanterns with heavy rainfall throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite cooking area with stone fire ring

events.description: camera pans up from bright firelight to reveal dark rainy surroundings
moving from sheltered fire area to open rainy camp

agents.ego_description: circling the campfire and examining the cooking pot before looking up to survey the camp

entered.detail: wooden tripod structure standing over the fire with a pot hanging from it
large black iron pot suspended over the flames by a chain
circle of smooth stones surrounding the campfire
red and gray checkered blanket lying on the muddy ground
wooden barrel with metal bands standing upright near the fire

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a close-up of a campfire at night, with an iron cooking pot hanging from a wooden tripod. The camera circles the fire, revealing a plaid blanket and wooden barrels scattered on the muddy ground. As the camera pans upward, the heavy rain and dark camp surroundings become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy campsite thoroughfare with lantern posts

events.description: turning toward two men sitting at a wooden table playing dominoes

agents.ego_description: walking through the muddy camp toward two men engaged in a game at a wooden table

notable_agents.action: sitting at wooden table playing dominoes in the rain
sitting across the table placing domino tiles

entered.detail: oil lantern hanging from a wooden post illuminating the area
large canvas tent with wooden support poles
small wooden building with warm light glowing from windows
rough wooden table where two men are playing dominoes

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the fire, the camera reveals a rainy campsite with canvas tents and a hanging lantern. Two men are visible sitting at a wooden table playing dominoes. The camera approaches them through the mud, passing wooden barrels and fence posts.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite gaming area with dominoes table

events.description: circling around to view the domino game from behind one player
UI prompt appears offering to play All Fives dominoes for two dollars

agents.ego_description: standing behind the players watching the dominoes game intently as rain falls on the table

notable_agents.action: wearing a hat, playing dominoes and placing tiles on the wet wooden table
sitting with back to camera, contemplating next move and moving game pieces

entered.detail: simple wooden stool pulled up to the gaming table

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the domino players, moving closer to observe the game from behind one player wearing a hat. Rain continues to fall heavily as the men place wooden tiles on the table. A UI prompt appears indicating the player can join the game.

events.description: turning away from the domino table and walking deeper into the camp
passing wooden supply cart and approaching tent area on camp edge

agents.ego_description: walking away from the domino players and exploring the outer perimeter of the camp

entered.detail: wooden supply wagon with large spoked wheels parked in the mud
wooden supply crate sitting on the ground near a tent
small campfire burning in the distance between tents

segments.scene_description: Leaving the domino players behind, the camera walks through the rainy camp past a wooden supply wagon with large wheels. The path leads toward the camp edge where canvas tents and wooden crates are visible. Distant campfires glow through the rain and darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: canvas tent interior with bedding and stove

events.description: entering the canvas tent, moving from heavy rain to dry sheltered interior
interior lantern light becomes dominant as camera moves deeper inside away from entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the tent to get out of the rain, moving toward the cot

entered.detail: simple canvas cot with wooden frame set up inside the tent
small metal stove with fire glowing inside providing heat
wooden chest for storage sitting against the tent wall
oil lantern hanging inside the tent providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a canvas tent and enters, leaving the heavy rain behind. Inside, the warm glow of a lantern reveals a simple cot, a wood-burning stove, and storage chests. The interior provides shelter from the storm with canvas walls enclosing the small living space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched frontier campsite that eventually leads into the sheltered warmth of a canvas tent. It begins with a close-up of a campfire and a hanging cooking pot, circling the flames to reveal a muddy ground scattered with barrels and blankets under a heavy downpour. As the camera moves away from the fire, the scene expands to show the wider camp, gliding through the mud toward two men playing dominoes at a wooden table. The camera circles the players to observe the game before turning away to pass a large supply wagon and various wooden crates glowing under distant campfires. Finally, the movement leads directly into a canvas tent, where the oppressive rain vanishes and is replaced by the warm lantern light of a small interior containing a cot and a wood-burning stove.
